memories.title: OOM Killer in Payment batch-service
memories.description: OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space during high-throughput end-of-month payment batch runs.
memories.rootCause: Memory leak in the XML payload parser. The batch processor was keeping all processed items in an in-memory ArrayList cache instead of stream-writing to DB, eventually exceeding the 2GB heap allocation.
memories.resolution: Migrated ProcessEngine cache from list collection to a reactive cursor Stream. Configured Jackson XML stream-writer to release memory segments per chunk. Added JVM heap option: -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+ExitOnOutOfMemoryError.
memories.feedbackNote: Applying G1GC and streaming fixed the recurring 2 AM batch crashes completely.

memories.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhaustion
memories.description: database connection pool exhausted. Active connections: 100, Idle: 0. Timeout waiting for connection.
memories.errorSignature: database connection pool exhausted. Active connections: 100
memories.rootCause: Database transactions in verifySession were un-indexed, causing individual queries to hold connections for up to 8 seconds during traffic surges. This quickly saturated the HikariCP max-pool limit of 100.
memories.resolution: Created composite index on sessions(user_id, session_token) to drop query times from 8000ms to 4ms. Reduced pool checkout timeout in Hikari from 30s to 5s. Optimized connection pool size to 150.
memories.feedbackNote: The indexing resolved the root lag. The pool hasn't hit exhaustion since.

memories.title: Redis Connection Hangup and ECONNRESET
memories.description: Redis connection lost. Socket hang up. Error: read ECONNRESET
memories.rootCause: Cloud NAT Gateway aggressively terminates idle TCP socket connections after 350 seconds. The ioredis client held socket connections open indefinitely without sending traffic, leading to unexpected ECONNRESET hangups.
memories.resolution: Configured TCP Keep-Alive on the Redis socket driver and added pingInterval: 30000 (30 seconds) in client connection parameters to guarantee continuous minimal traffic.
memories.feedbackNote: Keep-alive ping totally cured the socket hangup warning issues.

history.title: OutOfMemoryError in batch engine
history.description: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space on processBatch
history.stackTrace:
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
 at com.payments.ProcessEngine.allocateBuffer(ProcessEngine.java:1024)
 at com.payments.ProcessEngine.processBatch(ProcessEngine.java:245)
history.rootCause: XML payload parsing batches are fully cached in memory rather than stream-flushed, depleting heap limits.
history.resolution: Stream-write records to DB using G1GC and cursor chunk stream processing.

history.title: Postgres Connection Failure
history.description: database connection pool exhausted active: 100 waiting timeout
history.rootCause: Slow transaction in session verification due to lack of composite index on session logs.
history.resolution: Create composite index on sessions(user_id, session_token) and reduce connection timeout to 5s.

audits.routingReason: Massive log trace and nested stack frames detected. Routed to Gemini 3.1 Pro for deep structural analysis.
audits.escalationReason: Escalated from Gemini 3.5 Flash because stack frame nested depth exceeded 15 calls.

audits.routingReason: Moderate stack trace and database exhaustion logs. Routed to Gemini 3.5 Flash for balanced logical inference.
